targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM users WHERE banned = false;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM users WHERE banned = false AND created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM users WHERE banned = false AND active_car_count > 0;
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(active_car_count) FILTER (WHERE active_car_count > 0), 0)::float AS value FROM users WHERE banned = false;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM bot_metrics_events WHERE created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE AND event_name IN ('self_lead_sent', 'llm_lead_sent', 'assisted_lead_sent');
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM bot_metrics_events WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND event_name IN ('handler_exception', 'db_error');
SELECT day AS time, registered, active, with_subscription FROM mv_users_daily WHERE day >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY day;
SELECT day AS time, started, reached_auction, completed, with_results, clicked_lot, lead_sent FROM mv_self_funnel_daily WHERE day >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY day;

SELECT bucket AS time, event_name AS metric, event_count AS value FROM mv_events_hourly WHERE bucket >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND event_name IN (SELECT event_name FROM mv_events_hourly WHERE bucket >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY event_name ORDER BY SUM(event_count) DESC LIMIT 15) ORDER BY bucket;

panels.title: LLM-чат: старты vs лиды vs ошибки (день)

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, chat_started, lead_sent, handler_exceptions FROM mv_llm_funnel_daily WHERE day >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY day;

SELECT bucket AS time, avg_duration_ms AS "avg_ms", p95_duration_ms AS "p95_ms" FROM mv_delivery_hourly WHERE category = 'llm_chat' AND status = 'ok' AND bucket >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY bucket;
SELECT bucket AS time, category || ':' || status AS metric, delivery_count AS value FROM mv_delivery_hourly WHERE bucket >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY bucket;
SELECT event_name AS metric, SUM(event_count) AS value FROM mv_events_hourly WHERE bucket >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY event_name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT bucket AS time, event_count AS "hits", value_sum AS "total_wait_seconds" FROM mv_events_hourly WHERE event_name = 'telegram_retry_after' AND bucket >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY bucket;

SELECT REPLACE(event_name, 'ai_tool:', '') AS tool, SUM(value)::bigint AS calls FROM bot_metrics_events WHERE event_name LIKE 'ai_tool:%' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY event_name ORDER BY calls DESC;

WITH s AS (SELECT SUM(value) FILTER (WHERE event_name = 'ai_rag_hit') AS hits, SUM(value) FILTER (WHERE event_name = 'ai_rag_miss') AS misses FROM bot_metrics_events WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(hits, 0) + COALESCE(misses, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(hits::numeric / (hits + misses) * 100, 1) END AS value FROM s;
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(value)::bigint, 0) AS value FROM bot_metrics_events WHERE event_name = 'ai_lead_sent' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';
SELECT brand, model, COUNT(*)::bigint AS requests FROM self_selection_requests WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY brand, model ORDER BY requests DESC LIMIT 20;
